title: Mine In Abyss Modpack
description: A recreation of 'Made in Abyss' in Minecraft. Optional modpack to play on the server.
body:
![Mine In Abyss Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c65ff6c5ffa04d4c2356263c4dedca901e6c70d4.png)

# **Mine In Abyss Modpack**
Descend into the depths of the Abyss with the **Mine In Abyss Modpack**! Designed specifically for the [Mine In Abyss](https://mineinabyss.com/) server, this light-weight modpack gives you better performance, a higher render distance, and a few nice quality-of-life features to make exploring the Abyss more immersive than ever.

[![Download](https://img.shields.io/badge/download-modrinth-brightgreen?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mineinabyss-modpack/versions) 
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/385252444734619680?color=7289DA&label=Discord&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/QXPCk2y)
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-fabric-blue?logo=fabric)](https://fabricmc.net)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/minecraft-1.21.8-62C7EB?logo=minecraft)](https://minecraft.net)

---

## **📖 Installation**
Follow our detailed [installation guide](https://outline.mineinabyss.com/s/home/doc/modpack-VbxUNQ4ztj) for basic installation and enabling higher render distance. 


## **✨ Higher Render Distance**
![A screenshot taken of the minecraft server using the Voxy mod to showcase it's ability to show the entire map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6f148c8828bd35b06d4aa578a90a7aad37e928.png)

Experience the Abyss with our custom fork of **[Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)**, which lets you see the *entire* abyss. Yes, Voxy even lets you see over 7000 blocks up and down. That is over 15x the vanilla world height with minimal performance loss! 

> **Note:** Voxy doesn't have shader support, but some shaders such as Complementary Unbound do work.

## **❓ Do I need this modpack to play Mine in Abyss?**
No, you can play on the server with a vanilla client.
